name: Clouds at Sunrise
recipeIngredient: 21 oz Can Thank You Cherry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Beat egg whites until frothy, add cream of tartar, then gradually add sugar. Beat until stiff peaks form.
3. Gently fold in crushed crackers, nuts, and vanilla into the egg white mixture.
4. Spread batter evenly in a well-buttered 9 x 13 glass baking dish.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until set.
6. Cool on a rack.
7. Whip cream and spread over top.
8. Spoon pie filling over cream.
9. Chill several hours or overnight before serving.
I have used two packages of Dream Whip in this to cut down on calories.
Recipe came from the back of a pie filling can. Our son requests this every year for his birthday "cake" and I have taken it to work for Valentine's Day more than once. It always goes over BIG! Vicki in Flo, MO Posted on $P DESSERTS & SWEETS on 01/12 by VICKI HENSLER (BJVK33C) MM by Cathy Svitek
